function.name: lookup_order
function.description: Retrieves the current status, items, and shipping details of a customer's order. Use this whenever the user asks about an order or a delivery.

order_id.description: The unique alphanumeric ID of the order (e.g., ORD-12345).

function.name: initiate_refund
function.description: Starts the refund process for an order. Only call this if the user explicitly requests a refund and you have verified the order exists.

order_id.description: The order ID to be refunded.

reason.description: The reason for the refund, summarized from the user's message.

function.name: escalate_to_human
function.description: Escalates the conversation to a human support agent. Use this if the user is extremely angry, explicitly asks for a human, or if you cannot resolve their issue with the available tools.

issue_summary.description: A concise summary of what the user is trying to achieve and why they are frustrated.

urgency.description: The urgency level based on the user's sentiment.
